Method
Dietitian notes
Tags — powers auto-select & compliance
Import recipes (from Claude, with photos)
Ask Claude to "import these recipes" with recipe text/photos — paste the JSON it returns (kaana-recipe-import/1). Ingredients are matched to the databases automatically; everything lands unverified for your review.
Import foods (label photos → Claude → here)
Photograph nutrition labels, ask Claude to "import these labels", then paste the JSON it gives you below (or choose the file it saved).
Food Identification
Fill missing values from a reference food
Type panel values below first. Then search a generic/similar food here to fill the blanks (e.g. potassium, magnesium, vitamins not on the label). Your typed values are kept.
